summary.para: Represents a specialized node that can only exist within a ContextNode.
The ContextNode that contains this block node.
The index of this block node within the list of blocks in the context node.
A specialized node that serves as a dynamic container for compatible BlockNode instances.
The number of BlockNodes contained in this context node.
An IEnumerable collection of the BlockNodes contained in this context node.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.ContextNode.GetBlock(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves the BlockNode at the specified index in the context node's block list.

member.param: The zero-based index of the block to retrieve.

returns.para: The BlockNode at the specified index.

summary.para: Represents the core definition of a graph and defines its behavior.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph.GetNode(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves a node defined in the graph by its index.

member.param: The zero-based index of the node to retrieve.

returns.para: The INode at the specified index.

summary.para: Retrieves all nodes in the graph.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of all INodes in the graph.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph.GetVariable(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves a variable declared in the graph by index.

member.param: The index of the variable to retrieve.

returns.para: The IVariable at the specified index.

summary.para: Retrieves all variables declared in the graph.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of all IVariables declared in the graph.

summary.para: The name of the graph.
The number of INodes in the graph.
Called when the graph is unloaded, or goes out of scope in the editor.
Called when the graph is created or loaded in the editor.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph.OnGraphChanged(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphLogger)

summary.para: Called after the graph has changed.

member.param: The GraphLogger that receives any errors or warnings related to the graph.

summary.para: The number of IVariables declared in the graph.
Attribute used to declare a graph type by associating it with a file extension and optional configuration options.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphAttribute.#ctor(System.String,Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphOptions)

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the GraphAttribute class with a file extension and optional graph options.

member.param: The file extension to associate with assets of the graph type. This value must be unique because Unity uses it to select the correct importer.
The configuration options for the graph. Defaults to GraphOptions.Default if not specified.

summary.para: Gets the file extension associated with the Graph.
Gets the graph configuration options.
Provides functionality needed to access, and perform operations on, graph assets.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.CreateGraph(System.String)

summary.para: Creates a new graph asset of type T at the specified file path.

member.param: The relative path for the new asset (e.g., "AssetsGraphsMyGraph.mygraph").

returns.para: The created graph instance.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.GetGraphAssetGUID(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph)

summary.para: Retrieves the globally unique identifier (GUID) for the asset associated with the specified Graph.

member.param: The graph whose asset GUID you want to retrieve.

returns.para: The GUID of the graph asset.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.GetGraphAssetPath(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph)

summary.para: Retrieves the file path of the asset associated with the specified Graph.

member.param: The graph whose asset path you want to retrieve.

returns.para: The asset's file path.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.LoadGraph(System.String)

summary.para: Loads a Graph of type T from the asset at the specified path.

member.param: The relative path to the graph asset (for example, "AssetsGraphsMyGraph.mygraph").

returns.para: The loaded graph instance, or null if no matching graph is found.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.LoadGraphForImporter(System.String)

summary.para: Loads a fresh instance of the Graph of type T from disk for use in the asset import pipeline.

member.param: The path to the graph asset file.

returns.para: A new instance of the graph read directly from disk.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.PromptInProjectBrowserToCreateNewAsset(System.String)

summary.para: Creates a new graph asset and activates the naming field in the Project Browser.

member.param: The default name for the new asset if the user does not rename it. Defaults to "New Graph" if not specified.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphDatabase.SaveGraph(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Graph)

summary.para: Saves the asset of the specified Graph to disk if it has unsaved changes.

member.param: The graph to save.

summary.para: Provides methods for logging messages, warnings, and errors associated with a graph.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphLogger.Log(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs an informational message.

member.param: The message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the message relates to.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphLogger.LogError(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs an error message.

member.param: The error message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the error message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the error relates to.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.GraphLogger.LogWarning(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs a warning message.

member.param: The warning message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the warning message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the warning relates to.

summary.para: Flags that define configuration options that affect the behavior and capabilities of a Graph class.
The default graph configuration.
Indicates that nodes (i.e., subclasses of Node) defined in the same assembly as the graph are not automatically added to the graph item library.
No graph options enabled.
Indicates that this graph supports subgraphs.
Interface for a specialized node that outputs a fixed value of a specific data type.
The data type of the constant node's value.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IConstantNode.TryGetValue(T&)

summary.para: Attempts to retrieve the value of the constant node as the specified type.

member.param: The output parameter that holds the value if the conversion is successful.

returns.para: true if the value was successfully retrieved and cast to T; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Interface for a container that handles errors, warnings, and informational messages related to a graph or its elements.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IErrorsAndWarnings.Log(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs an informational message.

member.param: The message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the message relates to.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IErrorsAndWarnings.LogError(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs an error message.

member.param: The error message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the error message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the error relates to.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IErrorsAndWarnings.LogWarning(System.Object,System.Object)

summary.para: Logs a warning message.

member.param: The warning message to display.
Optional context object to associate with the warning message. The context is typically a node in the graph that the warning relates to.

summary.para: Base interface for input port builders in a port definition context.
Configures the input port to use the DelayedAttribute.

returns.para: The current builder instance for method chaining.

summary.para: Interface for defining an input port.
Interface for defining an input port that uses a specific generic data type.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IInputPortBuilder_1.WithDefaultValue(TData)

summary.para: Configures a default value of type TData to the input port.

member.param: The default value of type TData.

returns.para: An input port builder configured with the default value.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IInputPortBuilder.WithDataType(System.Type)

summary.para: Configures the data type of the input port.

member.param: The data type of the port.

returns.para: An input port builder that supports typed values.

summary.para: Configures the generic data type TData of the input port.

returns.para: An input port builder with the specified data type.

summary.para: Interface for a node.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INode.GetInputPort(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves an input port using its index.

member.param: The index of the input port.

returns.para: The input port at the specified index.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INode.GetInputPortByName(System.String)

summary.para: Retrieves an input port using its name.

member.param: The unique name of the input port within this node.

returns.para: The input port with the specified name, or null if no match is found.

summary.para: Retrieves all input ports on the node in the order they are displayed.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of input ports.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INode.GetOutputPort(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves an output port using its index in the displayed order.

member.param: The zero-based index of the output port.

returns.para: The output port at the specified index.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INode.GetOutputPortByName(System.String)

summary.para: Retrieves an output port using its name.

member.param: The unique name of the output port within this node.

returns.para: The output port with the specified name, or null if no match is found.

summary.para: Retrieves all output ports on the node in the order they are displayed.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of output ports.

summary.para: The number of input ports on the node.
The number of output ports on the node.
Provides extension methods related to nodes and ports in a graph.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INodeExtensions.GetNode(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPort)

summary.para: Retrieves the INode that owns the specified port.

member.param: The port to get the owning node from.

returns.para: The INode that contains the specified port.

summary.para: Interface for a node option.
The data type of the node option.
The display name of the node option shown in the UI.
The unique identifier of the node option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.INodeOption.TryGetValue(T&)

summary.para: Tries to retrieve the value of the node option using the specified type.

member.param: The variable to assign the value to, if retrieval succeeds.

returns.para: true if the option exists and the type matches; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Interface used to build and configure node options in a fluent manner.
Interface used to build and configure node options in a fluent manner.
Builds and returns the final INodeOption instance based on the current configuration of the builder.

returns.para: The constructed INodeOption.

summary.para: Configures the input port to use the UnityEngine.DelayedAttribute.
Configures the option to be shown only in the inspector, not in the node header.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder_1.WithDefaultValue(TData)

summary.para: Configures the default value for the option being built.

member.param: The default value to assign to the option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder_1.WithDisplayName(System.String)

summary.para: Configures the display name of the option being built.

member.param: The display name to assign to the option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder_1.WithTooltip(System.String)

summary.para: Configures the tooltip text for the option being built.

member.param: The tooltip text to assign to the option.

summary.para: Builds and returns the final INodeOption instance based on the current configuration of the builder.

returns.para: The constructed INodeOption.

summary.para: Configures the input port to use the UnityEngine.DelayedAttribute.
Configures the option to be shown only in the inspector, not in the node header.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder.WithDefaultValue(System.Object)

summary.para: Configures the default value for the option being built.

member.param: The default value to assign to the option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder.WithDisplayName(System.String)

summary.para: Configures the display name of the option being built.

member.param: The display name to assign to the option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOptionBuilder.WithTooltip(System.String)

summary.para: Configures the tooltip text for the option being built.

member.param: The tooltip text to assign to the option.

summary.para: Interface for defining an output port.
Interface for defining an output port that uses a specific generic data type.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IOutputPortBuilder.WithDataType(System.Type)

summary.para: Configures the data type of the output port.

member.param: The data type of the port.

returns.para: An output port builder with the specified data type.

summary.para: Configures the generic data type TData of the output port.

returns.para: An output port builder with the specified data type.

summary.para: Interface for a node port.
Gets the data type associated with the port.
Gets the direction of the port.
Gets the label displayed in the UI for the port.
Gets the first port connected to this port, if any.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPort.GetConnectedPorts(System.Collections.Generic.List`1<Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPort>)

summary.para: Retrieves all ports connected to this port.

member.param: A list to populate with the connected ports.

summary.para: Indicates whether the port is currently connected to any other port.
Gets the unique identifier name of the port.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPort.TryGetValue(T&)

summary.para: Tries to retrieve the current value assigned to the port’s UI field.

member.param: When successful, contains the value assigned to the port’s field.

returns.para: true if the port is not connected and a field value is available; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Base interface representing a generic port builder. Used in a builder pattern to configure and construct ports.
Builds and returns the final IPort instance based on the current configuration of the builder.

returns.para: The constructed IPort.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPortBuilder_1.WithConnectorUI(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.PortConnectorUI)

summary.para: Configures the connector UI shape for the port being built.

member.param: The PortConnectorUI shape to use.

returns.para: The current builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IPortBuilder_1.WithDisplayName(System.String)

summary.para: Configures the display name of the port being built.

member.param: The display name to assign to the port.

returns.para: The current builder instance for method chaining.

summary.para: Interface for a specialized node that references a subgraph and exposes its input and output variables as ports.
Retrieves the subgraph linked to this node.

returns.para: The Graph instance that this node references.

summary.para: Interface for defining a typed input port.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.ITypedInputPortBuilder.WithDefaultValue(System.Object)

summary.para: Configures a default value for the input port.

member.param: The default value for the port.

returns.para: An input port builder configured with the default value.

summary.para: Interface for defining a typed output port.
Interface for a graph variable.
Gets the data type of the variable.
Gets the name of the variable.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.IVariable.TryGetDefaultValue(T&)

summary.para: Tries to retrieve the default value of the variable.

member.param: The retrieved default value, if available.

returns.para: true if a default value exists and is of the correct type; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Gets the kind of the variable, such as Local, Input, or Output.
Interface for a variable node, which is a specialized node that references a IVariable defined in the graph.
Retrieves the IVariable associated with the node.
The base class for all user-accessible nodes in a graph.
Defines the structure of the node by building its ports and options.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetInputPort(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves an input port using its index.

member.param: The index of the input port.

returns.para: The input port at the specified index.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetInputPortByName(System.String)

summary.para: Retrieves an input port using its name.

member.param: The unique name of the input port within this node.

returns.para: The input port with the specified name, or null if no match is found.

summary.para: Retrieves all input ports on the node in the order they are displayed.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of input ports.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetNodeOption(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves a node option using its zero-based index.

member.param: Index of the node option, based on display order.

returns.para: The node option at the specified index.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetNodeOptionByName(System.String)

summary.para: Retrieves a node option using its name.

member.param: The unique name of the node option.

returns.para: The node option with the specified name, or null if none is found.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetOutputPort(System.Int32)

summary.para: Retrieves an output port using its index in the displayed order.

member.param: The zero-based index of the output port.

returns.para: The output port at the specified index.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.GetOutputPortByName(System.String)

summary.para: Retrieves an output port using its name.

member.param: The unique name of the output port within this node.

returns.para: The output port with the specified name, or null if no match is found.

summary.para: Retrieves all output ports on the node in the order they are displayed.

returns.para: An IEnumerable of output ports.

summary.para: The number of input ports on the node.
Interface that provides methods to declare node options inside a node.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IOptionDefinitionContext.AddOption(System.String,System.Type)

summary.para: Adds a new node option.

member.param: The unique identifier of the option.
The data type of the option.

returns.para: An IOptionBuilder to further configure the option.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IOptionDefinitionContext.AddOption(System.String)

summary.para: Adds a new node option.

member.param: The unique identifier of the option.

returns.para: An IOptionBuilder to further configure the option.

summary.para: Interface that provides methods to define input and output ports during Node.OnDefinePorts execution.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IPortDefinitionContext.AddInputPort(System.String)

summary.para: Adds a new input port.

member.param: The unique identifier of the input port.

returns.para: An IInputPortBuilder to further configure the input port.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IPortDefinitionContext.AddInputPort(System.String)

summary.para: Adds a new typed input port with the specified name.

member.param: The unique identifier of the input port.

returns.para: An IInputPortBuilder_1 to further configure the typed input port.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IPortDefinitionContext.AddOutputPort(System.String)

summary.para: Adds a new output port with the specified name.

member.param: The unique identifier of the output port.

returns.para: An IOutputPortBuilder to further configure the output port.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.IPortDefinitionContext.AddOutputPort(System.String)

summary.para: Adds a new typed output port with the specified name.

member.param: The unique identifier of the output port.

returns.para: An IOutputPortBuilder_1 to further configure the typed output port.

summary.para: The number of node options defined in the node.
The node options defined on this node.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.OnDefineOptions(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node/IOptionDefinitionContext)

summary.para: Called during DefineNode to define the options available on the node.

member.param: Provides methods for defining node options.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node.OnDefinePorts(Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.Node/IPortDefinitionContext)

summary.para: Called during DefineNode to define the input and output ports of the node.

member.param: Provides methods for defining input and output ports.

summary.para: Called when the node is removed or when the graph is disabled.
Called when the node is created or when the graph is enabled.
The number of output ports on the node.
Specifies the visual style of the connector used to represent a port in the UI.
An arrowhead connector shape.
A circular connector shape.
Specifies the direction of a port in the graph.
The port receives information. It accepts connections from output ports.
The port does not have a fixed direction. It may receive or send information.
The port sends information. It creates connections to input ports.
Attribute used to define a link between a subgraph type and a main graph type.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.SubgraphAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the SubgraphAttribute class.

member.param: The type of the main Graph that this subgraph type is compatible with. This must be a type that inherits from Graph.

summary.para: The type of the main Graph that supports this subgraph type.
Attribute used to indicate which types of ContextNode can contain a given BlockNode type.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.UseWithContextAttribute.#ctor(System.Type[])

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the UseWithContextAttribute class with the specified context node types.

member.param: An array of context node types that can contain the decorated block node.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.UseWithContextAttribute.IsContextTypeSupported(System.Type)

summary.para: Determines whether the specified context node type supports the block node decorated with this attribute.

member.param: The type of the context node to check against.

returns.para: true if the context node type is supported; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Attribute used to specify which Graph types are compatible with the decorated Node class.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.UseWithGraphAttribute.#ctor(System.Type[])

summary.para: Initializes a new instance of the UseWithGraphAttribute class with the specified supported graph types.

member.param: An array of graph types that support the decorated node type.

member.name: M:Unity.GraphToolkit.Editor.UseWithGraphAttribute.IsGraphTypeSupported(System.Type)

summary.para: Determines whether the specified graph type supports the node decorated with this attribute.

member.param: The type of the graph to validate.

returns.para: true if the graph type supports the node; otherwise, false.

summary.para: Specifies the scope of a IVariable.
A variable used as an input to a subgraph.
A variable used only within the current graph.
A variable used as an output from a subgraph.
